description_long: This is a round, squat container with a matte olive-green lid and a translucent, frosted body. The lid appears to be made of plastic and is likely screw-on, providing a secure closure for the contents. The body of the container is adorned with a product label featuring soft green and beige tones, botanical motifs, and text, suggesting a natural or organic product. The label includes branding, product information, and ingredients, with the word 'Navital' and a 'Bio' badge visible. The container is compact and designed to be easily portable, suitable for storing lotion or cream. Its overall appearance is clean, modern, and eco-friendly, making it appropriate for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A compact, round lotion container with a matte olive-green screw-on lid and a frosted body featuring botanical-themed labeling.
description_view_0: The front view shows the olive-green lid and the frosted body, with minimal label detail visible.
description_view_1: This side view reveals part of the product label and barcode on the frosted body, with the lid's color and shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the main product label, including branding, product name, and ingredient details, along with decorative graphics.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the lid and a partial side of the label, highlighting the container's round shape and label placement.
